Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dylan Recht for petitioner Judy Iwanaga (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement.

Mr. Recht confirmed that all parties consented to the settlement and that Jenny Chin had signed the agreement.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dylan J. Recht for Judy Iwanaga, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the supplement to the petition addressing dependent revocation. Mr. Recht confirmed there were no objections to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 27, 2006, is admitted to probate. Judy Iwanaga is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for December 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dylan Recht appeared by zoom for Judy Iwanaga.

Mr. Recht expressed his position regarding the issue of whether the presumption under Probate Code 6112(c) applies. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Recht is to file points and authorities by July 31, 2024. The court raised the issue of Mr. Recht's client being present at the next hearing and the issue of proceeding with a full bond.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
